workplan: Integrate all 8 agents into a single orchestrated pipeline.py. Test end-to-end with a real user message through all agents using OpenRouter GPT-4o-mini.
tasks_completed: Created backend/pipeline.py orchestrating all 8 agents in sequence
Pipeline prints progress for each of the 8 stages with checkmarks
Handles agent failures gracefully: non-critical agents (notification, followup) fail silently
Critical agents (intent, booking) stop pipeline on failure
Saves full pipeline result JSON to artifacts/pipeline_demo_result.json
Confirmed full end-to-end run: all 8 agents ran successfully
Booking ID BK2026051710151566D0 created in Firestore
decisions_made: Critical path: Intent → Discovery → Booking (fail-fast on error)
Optional path: Notifications, Follow-up (fail-silently, logged as warnings)
Pipeline returns summary dict with booking_id, provider, price, confirmation message
PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 required on Windows for Unicode checkmarks in output
tools_called: OpenRouter API via LiteLLM (8 separate LLM calls in pipeline)
errors_encountered: Unicode encode error on Windows console: fixed with PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8
LiteLLM botocore warning: benign, no fix needed (AWS modules not installed)
outcome: Full 8-agent KhidmatAI pipeline working end-to-end. User message in English processed through all agents: Intent extracted (AC_REPAIR, DHA Lahore, URGENT), 1 provider found (Bilal Ahmad), ranked 9.56/10, price estimated PKR 4000, booking confirmed in Firestore, 2 notifications sent, follow-up scheduled.
